narrative.heading: Market Size & Growth
paragraphs: The global hair care market was valued at $92.52 billion in 2020 and $94.92 billion in 2021, with projected sales of $105.14 billion by 2025.
The female hair care segment continues to lead the market, accounting for approximately 73% of global revenue — about $70 billion.

narrative.heading: An Underserved, High-Value Segment
paragraphs: An estimated 216 million people in the U.S. have wavy, curly, or coily hair, and they spend an average of $247 per year on products — versus $139 for those with naturally straight hair.
The total addressable market for textured-hair products is approximately $53 billion, with a consumer base that is loyal, research-driven, and increasingly buying premium beauty.
